allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text',''\) if text: print\(f'[{role}] {text[:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}] {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")
